SYSTEMS

MK Sentinel

Type IoT Research
Focus Area Hazard Prediction
Hardware Arduino/ESP8266
Algorithms Decision Trees

The Challenge

Traditional non-portable domestic alarms are prone to false positives and lack contextual intelligence when detecting concurrent hazards like LPG gas leaks, smoke, and fires. A unified, real-time prediction model was required.

The Solution

Co-authored research and developed "MK Sentinel", a real-time IoT system integrating multi-modal sensors (MQ 2, MQ 6, YG1006, DHT11) with an Arduino Uno. Used a lightweight decision tree classifier to eliminate 70% of false alarms, reporting hazards in under 5 seconds with a React-based web dashboard.

MK Sentinel
